title: AI Zombie
description: Uses the default AI provider to create a cinematic zombie transformation.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a cinematic zombie-apocalypse portrait using realistic practical horror makeup. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial structure, pose, camera angle, and main framing while adding an undead pallor, subtle facial cracks, haunting eyes, torn weathered clothing, an abandoned urban environment, dramatic horror lighting, detailed skin texture, and premium movie special-effects realism. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, extra limbs, extra fingers, duplicate body parts, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, extreme gore, exposed organs, dismemberment, excessive blood, graphic violence, unrecognizable face, pixelated, low detail, cropped subject, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. abandoned mall, cinematic horror lighting...
